name: Learning Roadmap Builder
description: Build a structured learning roadmap for any skill

agents.name: Skill Mapper
agents.purpose: Research the skill landscape and best learning paths
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the best learning path for the specified skill. Identify prerequisites, core topics, advanced topics, and recommended resources (courses, books, projects).

agents.name: Roadmap Builder
agents.purpose: Build a structured learning roadmap with milestones
agents.system_prompt_hint: Build a week-by-week learning roadmap. Include: milestones, specific resources for each phase, hands-on projects, and assessment checkpoints. Estimate time commitment per week.

suggestion_card.title: Learning Roadmap
suggestion_card.subtitle: Build a roadmap to learn any skill

author: agentfactory
